description.en: DOA 2019-cited protectant dithiocarbamate fungicide for foliar fungal diseases (Cercospora, Mycosphaerella, Alternaria, Septoria leaf spots; anthracnose; early/late blight; downy mildew). Purely protective action — apply **before** disease establishes.

instructions.en: Foliar spray: dissolve 20 g per 10 L water. Application rates: 650–800 g/ha for low-foliage crops, 1,000–1,200 g/ha for high-foliage crops. Repeat at 7–10 day intervals. Tank-mix with a systemic fungicide for late-blight management.

safety_notes.en: PHI 14 days. Wear PPE — respirator, gloves, long sleeves. Avoid drift to water bodies. Moderate toxicity to fish.

instructions.quote: mancozeb 75% WG is recommended at 20 g per 10 liters of water, with application rates of 650-800 g per hectare for low foliage and 1000-1200 g per hectare for high foliage, with a 7-10 day application interval and 14-day PHI

chemical.quote: 20 g per 10 liters of water, with application rates of 650-800 g per hectare for low foliage and 1000-1200 g per hectare for high foliage, with a 7-10 day application interval and 14-day PHI
chemical.review_notes: PHI 14 days per DOA; agronomist must verify current ORP registration before publish (hard gate).
